SessionStart.command: cd /home/user/SICT && git pull origin master --ff-only 2>/dev/null; echo 'SICT repo synced'
SessionStart.description: Auto-pull latest changes on session start

Stop.command: cd /home/user/SICT && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "sync: auto-commit $(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M)" && git push origin master 2>/dev/null); echo 'SICT repo pushed'
Stop.description: Auto-commit and push changes on session end
